tldr: BoxyHQ (enterprise SSO/SAML for SaaS) and Turnkey (secure-enclave wallet/key infrastructure) solve different problems, so a direct migration is unlikely without a product change.
why_switch: Your product pivoted from SaaS auth to crypto/fintech key management
You need hardware-backed signing and policy-driven key custody, which BoxyHQ does not provide
You want a non-custodial wallet API rather than SSO/SAML federation
You are consolidating crypto infrastructure under one vendor
Compliance requires secure-enclave key storage rather than identity federation
what_to_export: SSO connection metadata (SAML/OIDC) — only if still needed in the new stack
Existing session/JWT signing keys (for rotation, not import)
export_method: Use BoxyHQ's admin tooling and database access (BoxyHQ is open source) to dump SSO connections, directory sync state, users and tenants. Consult BoxyHQ official docs for the exact admin/API endpoints, since identity data structures change between versions.
import_method: Turnkey is wallet/key infrastructure rather than an identity provider, so most BoxyHQ data has no direct destination. Recreate user-equivalent entities as Turnkey sub-organizations or end-users via the Turnkey API and SDK; consult Turnkey official docs for the current organization, user, and policy primitives.

concept_mapping.note: Verify naming and limits in current Turnkey docs
Turnkey models humans and API actors explicitly
Not a direct equivalent; Turnkey is not a federation IdP
Turnkey uses programmable policies; rewrite from scratch
Confirm retention and export options in docs

gotchas: BoxyHQ and Turnkey are not interchangeable — confirm Turnkey actually fits the use case
No drop-in SAML/SCIM replacement: enterprise SSO needs a separate IdP
Key material from BoxyHQ session signing should be rotated, not migrated
Pricing models differ (subscription vs usage); model expected costs before cutover
Plan a parallel-run period to validate signing flows under real load

email.subject: Cancellation: BoxyHQ subscription
email.body:
Hi BoxyHQ team,

We are winding down our use of BoxyHQ as our product needs have shifted toward wallet and key infrastructure (we are moving to Turnkey). Please confirm the cancellation date, final invoice, and the data export options available before account closure.

Thanks for the support so far.

Best regards
